text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, December 06. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Updating our financial spreadsheets. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing our household budget today. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Budget tracking is updated. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Understood. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
